carrier_lookup_engine.runtime_role: Offline parsing of international lines to extract ISO country codes at the edge.

esim_profile_decoder.runtime_role: Validates Activation Code LPA string formats generated by ResellPortal.

ip_geolocation_data.runtime_role: Edge localized geo-lookups to customize client copy based on target US Zip Code/City.

open_rss_crawler.runtime_role: Automates RSS parsing loops inside GitHub Actions pipeline.
